article.title: US pulls the 'kill-switch' on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI models, sending global allies scrambling — European and Canadian leaders alarm allies over sudden export bans
article.summary: Following the Trump administration's block on Anthropic's Mythos 5 and Fable 5 models, world leaders have raised concerns that without direct access to frontier models, they may need to develop their own national alternatives.
article.title_zh: 美國對 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 AI 模型祭出「殺手鐧」，導致全球盟國陷入混亂 — 歐洲和加拿大領導人為突如其來的出口禁令警告盟國
article.summary_zh: 在川普政府封鎖 Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 和 Fable 5 模型後，世界各國領導人表示關切，認為如果無法直接存取前沿模型，可能需要開發自己的國家替代方案。

article.title: Can Musk Pull Off a SpaceX-Tesla Merger?
article.summary: Should Elon Musk merge SpaceX and Tesla, into one company? There’s huge conflicts of interest here, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Liam Denning says. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.summary_zh: 彭博觀點專欄作家Liam Denning探討埃隆·馬斯克是否應將SpaceX和Tesla合併成一家公司，並指出其中存在的巨大利益衝突。

article.title: Anthropic Gets A Warning, SpaceX Shares Fall on Fourth Day | Bloomberg Tech 6/17/2026
article.summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow discusses US Commerce Secretary's warning to Anthropic that it needs government permission to grant foreign nationals access to the company's most advanced AI models. Plus, after three days of soaring, SpaceX shares come back down to Earth and drop for the first time on the company's fourth trading day. And, Bloomberg reports Apple's upcoming camera-equipped AirPods will launch in late 2027 as part of a flurry of new releases. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Anthropic收到警告，SpaceX股票第四天下跌 | 彭博科技 6/17/2026
article.summary_zh: 彭博的Ed Ludlow報導美國商務部長對Anthropic的警告以及SpaceX股票連漲三日後首次下跌。

article.title: Bosch to pay $36 million penalty for $72 million in ‘illicit’ sales to Huawei — German company sold export-controlled goods and software to banned Chinese firm between 2020 and 2024
article.summary: The U.S. fined Bosch $36 million for selling export-controlled product to Huawei, including software and MEMS sensors. The German company agreed to pay the penalty, as well as disgorging part of the profits it made from the 'illicit' sales.
article.title_zh: Bosch 因向華為進行 $7,200 萬「非法」銷售被罰 $3,600 萬 — 德國公司在 2020 至 2024 年間向被制裁的中國公司銷售受管制商品和軟體
article.summary_zh: 美國對 Bosch 處以 $3,600 萬罰款，因其向華為銷售受管制產品（包括軟體和 MEMS 感測器）；該德國公司同意支付罰款並吐出部分「非法」銷售的利潤。

article.title: Survey explains why smartphone brands keep delaying real battery breakthroughs
article.summary: Buying a new smartphone is almost as tricky as picking a new car. Do you go for size, economy, or raw power? For me, the most important aspect for me was certainly economy, followed by utility, and finally ease of use, and that’s likely how my smartphone purchasing decision hierarchy stacks up, too. But we’re all different, and each person will have one aspect they simply won’t sacrifice for anything else. For my colleague Mitja, it’s all about design . But what do you think? We asked readers in a recent poll what their most important checklist item is, and the results shed light on why some smartphone manufacturers spend so much time on stage and hours in the lab working on two critical aspects.
article.title_zh: 調查解釋了為什麼智慧手機品牌不斷延遲真正的電池突破
article.summary_zh: 購買新的智慧手機幾乎和選擇新車一樣棘手。對我來說，最重要的方面肯定是經濟性，其次是實用性，最後是易用性。

article.title: Fable 5 ban: 4 open models responded before Anthropic could restore access
article.summary: On Friday, June 12, the United States government ordered Anthropic to suspend Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nationals. Anthropic complied and pulled both models for all customers worldwide. Within the same week, a cluster of open-weight coding models gave enterprises outside the US a set of fallback candidates. Two of those releases were already in flight when the order landed, and the ban made enterprises treat them as urgent rather than theoretical. Enterprise buyers have seen this in hardware procurement. When a single supplier gets cut off, the qualified-alternate list suddenly matters. The teams that already second-sourced keep shipping while the rest scramble. The teams that already second-sourced keep shipping while the rest scramble. Open weights are that second sourc
article.title_zh: Fable 5 禁令：4 個開放模型在 Anthropic 恢復訪問前做出了響應
article.summary_zh: 6 月 12 日星期五，美國政府下令 Anthropic 暫停為所有外國用戶提供 Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5。Anthropic 遵令並為全球所有客戶下架了這兩個模型。同週內，一群開放權重編碼模型為美國以外的企業提供了解決方案。

article.title: Tariffs Greater Impact Than War: Trumpf
article.summary: The Iran war has not had a "severe" impact on the machine tool industry says Stephan Mayer, CEO for Machine Tools at German manufacturing technology firm Trumpf. Instead, the bigger headwind to the industry has been tariffs, according to Mayer. He spoke to "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.summary_zh: 德國製造技術公司Trumpf的機床部門首席執行官Stephan Mayer表示，伊朗戰爭對機床行業沒有「嚴重」影響，反而關稅成為該行業更大的逆風。

article.title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
article.summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: Politics getting in the way.
article.title_zh: Anthropic禁令迫使投資者重新評估政治風險
article.summary_zh: 在火熱的AI股票上漲浪潮中，投資者必須突然考慮一項風險，其潛在破壞力可能超過高估值和大額支出：政治干擾。

article.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
article.title_zh: 代理能力是否足夠？在自有工具上對開源模型進行基準測試

article.title: Ditching the cloud for local AI — how I use two mini PCs to process millions of tokens a day and save money on costly API fees
article.summary: As new data center buildouts hit planning walls and AI inference providers hike costs, is the future of AI to roll your own models?
article.title_zh: 放棄雲端轉向本地 AI — 我如何使用兩台迷你電腦每天處理數百萬個 token 並節省昂貴的 API 費用
article.summary_zh: 隨著新數據中心建設遇冷和 AI 推理服務成本上升，AI 的未來是否在於自建模型？

article.title: Frontier Airlines site leaks all personal info with just a glance at a boarding pass, researcher claims — booking number and last name nets you every passenger's personal info, including address, passport, TSA PreCheck, and most credit card info
article.summary: Frontier Airlines site leaks all personal info with just a glance at a boarding pass — just a booking number and last name nets you all passengers' personal info including address, passport, TSA PreCheck, and most credit card info
article.title_zh: 研究人員稱 Frontier Airlines 網站只需瞥一眼登機證即可洩露所有個人資訊 — 預訂號和姓氏可獲得每位乘客的全部個人資訊，包括地址、護照、TSA PreCheck 和大部分信用卡資訊
article.summary_zh: Frontier Airlines 網站只需瞥一眼登機證即可洩露所有個人資訊 — 僅用預訂號和姓氏就能獲得所有乘客的全部個人資訊，包括地址、護照、TSA PreCheck 和大部分信用卡資訊。

article.title: Adobe expands Firefly capabilities, extends agentic tools to Creative Cloud apps
article.summary: Adobe is out with a massive update to its suite of creative agents today, including new Firefly capabilities and agentic features across several Creative Cloud apps. Here are the details.
article.title_zh: Adobe 擴展 Firefly 功能，將代理工具擴展到 Creative Cloud 應用
article.summary_zh: Adobe 推出了對其創意代理套件的重大更新，包括新的 Firefly 功能和多個 Creative Cloud 應用中的代理功能。

article.title: Mavenir urges telcos to sell AI tokens and not rely on OpenAI
article.summary: As Donald Trump cuts foreigners off from the most advanced American AI, Mavenir's CEO encourages the world's telcos to reinvent themselves as AI companies.
article.title_zh: Mavenir 敦促電信公司銷售 AI 代幣而非依賴 OpenAI
article.summary_zh: 隨著川普限制外國人使用最先進的美國 AI，Mavenir 執行長鼓勵全球電信公司將自身改造為 AI 公司。

article.title: Neoclouds, sovereign AI and Postgres: The new operating model for regulated enterprises
article.summary: Inference is now the dominant force in enterprise AI — and with it has come an inconvenient reality: Data is almost always transported to compute. Every inference call moves sensitive enterprise information out of the systems where it lives and into external environments optimized for GPU throughput rather than data governance. This creates friction that compounds at scale: rising costs, expanding security exposure, and a growing tangle of data copies that drift out of sync with operational reality. What enterprises actually want is different: to keep data and IP intact within the database rather than creating multiple copies and managing the resulting inconsistencies. Research across more than 2,050 senior executives from major enterprises worldwide suggests that 95% of organizations inte
article.title_zh: Neoclouds、主權 AI 和 Postgres：受監管企業的新運營模式
article.summary_zh: 推理現已成為企業 AI 的主導力量，隨之而來的是一個不便的現實：數據幾乎總是被傳輸到計算環境。每次推理調用都會將敏感的企業信息從其所在的系統移出，進入針對 GPU 吞吐量優化的外部環境。

article.title: Undersea cable connecting Egypt and Syria has been cut, state-owned telecom operator says — Damascus blames 'systematic sabotage campaign' as cause of damage
article.summary: The Syrian government blamed a third party for the damage on its undersea cable that connects it to Egypt. Damascus didn't mention any specific state or non-state actor, but its location makes it a prime target for disruption.
article.title_zh: 連接埃及和敘利亞的海底電纜遭切斷，國有電信運營商表示——大馬士革指責「系統性破壞活動」為損壞原因
article.summary_zh: 敘利亞政府指責第三方造成其與埃及連接的海底電纜損壞。大馬士革未提及任何具體國家或非國家行為體，但其地理位置使其成為破壞目標。

article.title: Sony’s latest camera sensor could let your next phone take the ultimate sunset photos
article.summary: Credit: Sony Semiconductor TL;DR Sony has announced the LYTIA L910 50MP camera sensor for smartphones. This is Sony’s first smartphone camera sensor with LOFIC, enabling wider dynamic range and reduced noise without multi-frame processing. The new camera sensor will ship to smartphone makers in summer 2026. Sony offers some of the most advanced smartphone camera sensors in the world, often powering the best camera phones . The company already announced a landmark 200MP sensor earlier this year, and it’s now announced another milestone mobile sensor. Sony announced the LYTIA L910 today (June 17), and this is the company’s first smartphone camera sensor with LOFIC technology. LOFIC stands for “Lateral Overflow Integration Capacitor,” and it allows camera sensors to simultaneously capture acc
article.title_zh: Sony 最新相機感測器讓你的下一部手機拍出完美夕陽照
article.summary_zh: Sony 發佈 LYTIA L910 50MP 相機感測器，這是首款搭載 LOFIC 技術的 Sony 智慧型手機相機感測器，可實現更寬的動態範圍和降低噪點。

article.title: Forget basic transcriptions: An upcoming wearable wants to power autonomous AI agents
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Plaud plans to launch a new wearable later this year that is designed to feed data directly into autonomous AI agents. CEO Nathan Xu revealed the upcoming wearable will target an eight-to-12-hour battery life and potential cellular connectivity, while the company is also experimenting with personalized AI that learns from users over time. Driven by its two million global users, Plaud projects an eye-popping $500 million in sales for 2026, even though half the year has already passed. While the experiences with the Humane AI Pin and Rabbit R1 left many wondering if dedicated consumer AI hardware was dead on arrival, one company has quietly been proving that there is real money to be made in ambient voice capture. Plaud Inc., the startup behi
article.title_zh: 忘記基本轉錄：即將推出的穿戴裝置想要驅動自主 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: Plaud 計畫今年推出新穿戴裝置，設計用於直接向自主 AI 代理提供數據，並支持 8-12 小時電池壽命和潛在的蜂窩連接。

article.title: Google Voice now take notes on your calls, then sends you the summary via Gmail
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google Voice is getting a nifty call transcription feature, just like the Pixel phones. In addition to transcribing calls, Voice uses Gemini to clean up notes and sends you a summary after the call. The feature currently only works in English and is limited to paying Google Voice subscribers. The Google Phone app, especially on recent Pixel devices, gets a slew of features to help you during calls. Those include screening unwanted telemarketing calls, blocking spam, and making it easier to understand what the caller is saying with captions. Another useful Pixel-exclusive feature, known as Call Notes , transcribes the entire call, so you can find key bits later by referencing the text. A similar functionality is now headed for Google Voice.
article.title_zh: Google Voice 現在在通話中做筆記，然後透過 Gmail 發送摘要
article.summary_zh: Google Voice 新增通話轉錄功能並使用 Gemini 整理筆記，通話後將摘要發送至 Gmail，目前僅支持英文。
